title: Rick's Bushy Leaves
description: Just adds bushy leaves, leaf variation, and better leaf colors.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537962f52dd7caf0b4308113117d7a2ac4e0b20d.png)

# Revamps the leaves and tweaks some colormaps.

## Designed as an add-on for [Rick's Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ricks-default). 

**(works best with optifine or whatever assortment of fabric mods you use for connected textures and color maps but not absolutely necessary.)**
